svg.title: Managed Godot game process lifecycle
svg.desc: An inferred lifecycle projects the explicit run, process-started, launch-failure, graceful-stop, clean-exit, timeout, forced-stop cleanup, process-exit, and abnormal-exit operations. Forced stop is reachable only after the graceful stop times out.
